name: LIVE TECHNO SUNDAY : Drusnoise (CAN/DE) // Maxpacemaker (BE) // Drool (NO).
description:
3 x 90 min live modulær/hardware techno-sett!

Fikk du ikke nok helg?           ❤️‍🔥🎶🚀      Vi lager en tidlig mini-Lørdag på Søndag, med 4,5 timer med techno i sin reneste form: 
---> Improviserte techno sett med modulærsynth/ hardware (og planter(!)).

20:00 drusnoise (Can/De)
21:30 MaxPacemaker (Be)
23:00 Drool

Varer til 00:45
CC: 100 kr i døra

drusnoise (Can/De):
drusnoise is a live, electronic music producer and co-founder of the Berlin Modular Society. 
Originally from Canada, his roots in techno lie in the 90s rave scenes of Canada and the UK before moving to Berlin and now Oslo. 
drusnoise integrates analog modular synthesizers with digital FX, organic samples, and living plants on stage to create a style that flows from lush ambient tones to gritty techno that brings sustainability to the dance floor.

https://www.instagram.com/drusnoise/

MaxPacemaker (Be):
MaxPacemaker is a techno artist from Antwerp, Belgium. Influenced by the likes of Ritchie Hawtin, Blawan and Speedy J, his improvised live-sets are undeniably situated on the darker side of the spectrum. 
Polyrhythms, acidic elements and reverberating rumbles merge together and create a maze of tunnels that may or may not lead you towards light.

https://www.instagram.com/maxpacemaker/

Drool:
Drool is a modular techno artist and DJ, and a resident at the Oslo based techno collective Portal. 
He improvises his live sets on his modular system, adding new stuff on the fly to keep the set evolving, riding the waves of happy accidents. Raw, hypnotic, dark, weird, sometimes noisy, Drool is always in search of that stankface vibe.

https://www.instagram.com/drool_techno/
